SEARCH
Module com.example.chermn
Package com.example.chermn

Class SpeechHelper

java.lang.Object
com.example.chermn.SpeechHelper
public class SpeechHelper extends Object
A helper class that provides Text-To-Speech (TTS) functionality using the operating system's built-in speech engine. Fully self-contained: - TTS enabled/disabled toggle - Voice selection - Volume control (0–100)
